zh.lifeSummary: Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith是Earl of Menteith和third Fifth Countess of Menteith的兒子，於1143年4月出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾。他於1168年與Agatha Gilchrist在蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1214年在蘇格蘭培爾享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith是Earl of Menteith和third Fifth Countess of Menteith的儿子，于1143年4月出生在英国苏格兰培爾。他于1168年与Agatha Gilchrist在苏格兰培爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1214年在苏格兰培爾享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Menteith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Gilchrist
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (western) and Irish (Down): from Gaelic Mac Giolla Chríosd, Mac Gille Chríosd ‘son of the servant of Christ’.

variants.name: Kilcrease
meanings: History: Robert Kilcrease (c. 1750–1808) came from Scotland(probably Kilmarnock) to Edgefield, SC, c. 1770.

variants.name: Gilchrest
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Gilchrist  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilkerson
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chrìosd ‘son of Gille Chrìosd' (see Gilchrist ).

variants.name: Gilkey
meanings: Irish (northern): possibly a pet form of the Scottishpersonal name   Gilchrist  .

variants.name: Gilcrest
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Gilchrist  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilcrease
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Gilchrist  .

en.lifeSummary: Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith was born in April 1143, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Earl of Menteith and third Fifth Countess of Menteith. He married Agatha Gilchrist in 1168, in Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1214, in Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith est né en avril 1143, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fils d’Earl of Menteith et third Fifth Countess of Menteith. Il a épousé Agatha Gilchrist en 1168, à Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1214, à Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith wurde im April 1143 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Earl of Menteith und third Fifth Countess of Menteith geboren. Er hat 1168 in Perthshire, Scotland Agatha Gilchrist geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1214 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Perthshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith è nato il nel aprile 1143 nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlio di Earl of Menteith e third Fifth Countess of Menteith. Lui sposato Agatha Gilchrist nel 1168, nel Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1214, nel Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteithは1143年4月にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアでEarl of Menteithとthird Fifth Countess of Menteithの息子として生まれた。1168年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアでAgatha Gilchristと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1214年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith(은)는 1143년 4월 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 Earl of Menteith(와)과 third Fifth Countess of Menteith의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1168년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 Agatha Gilchrist(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1214년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith nasceu em abril de 1143, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filho de Earl of Menteith e third Fifth Countess of Menteith. Ele casou-se com Agatha Gilchrist em 1168, em Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1214, em Perthshire, Scotland, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith родился апрель 1143 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Earl of Menteith и third Fifth Countess of Menteith. Он женился на женщине по имени Agatha Gilchrist в 1168 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1214 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Gilchrist Menteith - First Earl of Menteith nació en abril de 1143, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido como hijo de Earl of Menteith y third Fifth Countess of Menteith. Se casó con Agatha Gilchrist en 1168, en Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1214, en Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 71 años.
